text: A recipe for 12 cupcakes uses 300 g of sugar. Sam wants to make 20 cupcakes using the same recipe. How much sugar does he need?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Find how much sugar is needed per cupcake. 300 g ÷ 12 = 25 g per cupcake.
Step 2: Multiply by the number of cupcakes Sam wants to make. 25 g × 20 = 500 g.
So Sam needs 500 g of sugar.
